# Thesis outline

Owner: Allen Weber
Advisor: Prof. Lena Marsh
Linked: [[Displacement bibliography]]

## Chapters
- Background: zoning policy and displacement
- Two New England case cities
- Data and methods (R / ggplot)

## Next
- Draft proposal for Oct 5 deadline

# Case city notes

Owner: Allen Weber
Linked: [[Thesis outline]]

## Candidates
- Mid-size New England cities with recent zoning reform
- Need parcel-level data and displacement indicators

## Next
- Narrow to two cities with Prof. Marsh

# Methods notes

Owner: Allen Weber
Linked: [[Thesis outline]]

## Approach
- Join zoning overlays with census tract change
- Visualize in R with ggplot

## Open questions
- Which displacement proxy is defensible?
